---
title: "Obituary of Anne Sturges Bourne"
---

## Obituary of Anne Sturges Bourne

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1891
**Genre:** obituary
**Format:** article in journal

**Publisher:** possibly in <i>The Guardian</i>, perhaps 18 or 25 December 1891?

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
